headline: Design Consultant · Client Services
profile: Designer who runs the client relationship, not just the file. Seven years scoping, presenting, and shipping brand and product work for 30+ client teams.

bullets: Lead design for a B2B analytics platform used by 400+ teams.
Present quarterly roadmap work to enterprise customers and executive stakeholders.
Built the design system adopted by 3 product squads.
Owned client relationships across fintech and retail accounts.
Delivered 12 marketing sites and 4 product UIs from kickoff through launch.
Ran discovery workshops and wrote scopes for six-figure engagements.
Identity systems, packaging, and web design for 30+ small-business clients.
Ran brand workshops and delivered style guides teams could actually use.
